request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Idealista Iter Listings** crawler. Each record represents one property listing.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | integer | Unique identifier for this result. |
| **object** | string | Always `"result"`. |
| **squid** | string | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result. |
| **run** | string | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped. |
| **area** | number | Built area in square meters. |
| **bedrooms** | integer | Number of bedrooms. |
| **currency** | string | Currency symbol for the listing price. |
| **description** | string | Short listing description. |
| **floor** | string | Floor level (if provided). |
| **functions** | object or null | Reserved for any function-specific metadata. |
| **main_image** | string or null | URL of the primary listing image. |
| **native_id** | integer | Internal listing identifier. |
| **phone** | string | Contact phone number for the listing. |
| **price** | number | Listing price in specified currency. |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when the listing was fetched. |
| **title** | string | Listing title. |
| **url** | string | Direct URL to the listing page. |

response.name: Example
